title: 2024年度 第3回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. There's a hair in my spaghetti.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm very sorry, ma'am. I'll bring you another one.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Please hurry.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「急いで」に2の「すぐ戻ります」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「トマトスープ」→無関係。2「すぐ戻ります」→正解。3「ステーキが美味しい」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm looking for a dictionary.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. What kind of dictionary?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: An English one, please.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「英語の辞書を」に3の「こちらにあります」が店員の応答として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「話せます」→辞書の話。2「そうかもね」→不自然。3「こちらにあります」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Which high school will you go to?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't know yet.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to Westpark High.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ウエストパーク高校に行くの」に1の「いとこがそこに通ってる」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「いとこがそこに通ってる」→正解。2「家で勉強した」→無関係。3「好きな教科」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Excuse me.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is there an elevator in this hotel?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Yes, I put it in your room.
Yes, you can take a taxi.
questions.explanation: 「エレベーターはありますか？」に1の「あちらにあります」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「あちらにあります」→正解。2「部屋に置きました」→無関係。3「タクシーに乗れます」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Who's that boy next to the window?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's Jimmy's brother. He's in fifth grade.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What's his name?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「名前は？」に1の「思い出せない」が名前の質問への自然な応答。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「思い出せない」→正解。2「7年生」→学年の話ではない。3「10歳」→年齢の話ではない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you bring my book with you today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm sorry. I forgot it.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's OK. I can wait.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「待てるよ」に2の「明日持ってくる」が忘れ物への自然なフォロー。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「その図書館知ってる」→無関係。2「明日持ってくる」→正解。3「彼が貸してくれた」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you ready for our meeting?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. I couldn't make copies of the reports.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What's the problem?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何が問題？」に3の「コピー機が壊れた」が理由として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「時間通りに始まる」→問題の説明ではない。2「長い休暇」→無関係。3「コピー機が壊れた」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Robert, are you busy?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: There's a phone call for you.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「電話ですよ」に2の「すぐ行きます」が適切。
highlights: There's a phone call for you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昼食をどうぞ」→無関係。2「すぐ行きます」→正解。3「毎日電話する」→不自然。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: They have many different dishes here.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Have you decided yet?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I think I'll try the steak.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ステーキにする」に2の「私もそれにする」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「2回目」→無関係。2「私もそれにする」→正解。3「フランス料理だけ」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Could you help me?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have to go to my next class.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: But these books are heavy!

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「本が重い！」に1の「OK、何冊か持つよ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「OK、何冊か持つ」→正解。2「いいえ、結構です」→助けを求められている。3「借りられるよ」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you going to the festival tomorrow, Peter?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I'm going with Rachel's brother.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you see him often?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I haven't seen him since Tom's Christmas party.

questions.question: Who will Peter go to the festival with?
questions.explanation: 「レイチェルの兄弟と行く」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「レイチェル」→兄弟。2「レイチェルの兄弟」→正解。3「トム」→パーティーの名前。4「トムの兄弟」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How can I help you, sir?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What time does the hotel restaurant open?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: At six. If you're hungry now, you can buy something at the supermarket downstairs.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks, I will.

questions.question: What will the man do now?
questions.explanation: 「そうする」とスーパーに行くことに同意。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スーパーに行く」→正解。2「別のホテル」→言及なし。3「レストランで食事」→6時開店。4「時計を買う」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Don't forget about the dinner party tomorrow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's right. When does it start?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: At six thirty, so let's begin cooking at five.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. I'll be home from work at four thirty.

questions.question: What time will the party begin?
questions.explanation: パーティーは6時30分開始。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Your son is so busy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. He has baseball practice twice a week and a violin lesson every Friday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He does volunteer work once a month, too.

questions.question: How often does the man's son have a violin lesson?
questions.explanation: 「毎週金曜日にバイオリンレッスン」＝週1回。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「週1回」→正解。2「週2回」→野球の練習。3「月1回」→ボランティア。4「月2回」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is this your hat, Sally?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, Mr. Stevens. It's David's. It has his name on it.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you know where he is?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: He's in the library with Angie.

questions.question: Whose hat are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 「デイビッドの帽子」と名前が書いてある。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「デイビッドの」→正解。2「スティーブンスさん」→質問者。3「サリーの」→否定。4「アンジーの」→図書館にいる。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I want to join a sports team, Mom.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How about basketball or volleyball?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't like those sports. I want to play soccer.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: OK. Let's find a team for you.

questions.question: Which sport does the boy like?
questions.explanation: 「サッカーがしたい」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「バスケ」→好きじゃない。2「野球」→言及なし。3「サッカー」→正解。4「バレー」→好きじゃない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is this blue tennis racket yours?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, it's Mr. Thompson's. Mine is red.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I can't find my racket. It's black.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: You can use mine while I rest.

questions.question: Which racket is Mr. Thompson's?
questions.explanation: 「この青いラケットはトンプソンさんの」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「白」→言及なし。2「赤」→男の子のもの。3「黒」→女の子のもの。4「青」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you study history yesterday, Anna?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. I studied math.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What will you study tomorrow?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Science and English. I have two tests on Friday.

questions.question: Which subject did Anna study yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「昨日は数学を勉強した」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「数学」→正解。2「歴史」→勉強していない。3「理科」→明日。4「英語」→明日。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you ready to order dessert?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I'll have chocolate cake.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure. Anything else?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, thank you. I enjoyed the spicy curry.

questions.question: What will the man have next?
questions.explanation: デザートとしてチョコレートケーキを注文。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スパイシーパスタ」→言及なし。2「デザート」→正解。3「カレー」→もう食べた。4「水」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you find a nice dress?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, but it costs too much money.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll buy it for you.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, thanks. I'll find a cheaper one.

questions.question: Why didn't the woman buy the dress?
choices: It was not a nice color.
questions.explanation: 「高すぎる」が理由。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「長すぎ」→言及なし。2「小さすぎ」→言及なし。3「高すぎ」→正解。4「色が良くない」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: James loves animals. He wants a pet, but his parents said no. Yesterday, he went to his friend Tina's house. He was happy because he could play with her pet dog.

questions.question: Why was James happy yesterday?
questions.explanation: 「ティナの犬と遊べたから嬉しかった」。
highlights: he could play with her pet dog
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ティナの犬と遊んだ」→正解。2「新しいペットを手に入れた」→親が断った。3「農場を買った」→言及なし。4「ティナが来た」→ジェームズが行った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's easy to get to my house. First, go south on Henry Road. Then, turn right at the park, and you'll be on Carter Street. My house is on that street.

questions.question: Where does the man live?
questions.explanation: 「カーター通りに家がある」。
highlights: My house is on that street
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ヘンリーロード」→通る道。2「サウスストリート」→南に行くと混同。3「パークロード」→公園と混同。4「カーター通り」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Lucy has a good camera. She often takes pictures of the mountains when she goes hiking. Last weekend, she used her camera to take some pictures of her family.

questions.question: What did Lucy do last weekend?
choices: She gave her friend a picture.
She took pictures of her family.
questions.explanation: 「先週末、家族の写真を撮った」。
highlights: she used her camera to take some pictures of her family
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「友達に写真をあげた」→言及なし。2「家族の写真を撮った」→正解。3「カメラを買った」→すでに持っている。4「ハイキングに行った」→普段すること。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I live in a small town in the mountains. There aren't many shops around here, and it is usually cold. However, it's nice and quiet, so I love living here.

questions.question: What does the man like about his town?
questions.explanation: 「静かで良い」のが好きな理由。
highlights: it's nice and quiet, so I love living here
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「静か」→正解。2「暖かい」→通常寒い。3「店が多い」→少ない。4「とても大きい」→小さい町。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I work in a hotel. Every day, I start working at 6 a.m. I don't enjoy starting so early, but I do enjoy meeting guests and helping the other staff members.

questions.question: What doesn't the man like to do?
questions.explanation: 「こんなに早く始めるのは好きではない」。
highlights: I don't enjoy starting so early
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「人を助ける」→楽しんでいる。2「客に会う」→楽しんでいる。3「早く仕事を始める」→正解。4「ホテルに泊まる」→働いている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Last week, Alice took a test for a special job at her company. She has an interview this afternoon, and if she passes it, she will get more money.

questions.question: What will Alice do this afternoon?
questions.explanation: 「今日の午後面接がある」。
highlights: She has an interview this afternoon
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「銀行に行く」→言及なし。2「面接を受ける」→正解。3「父の仕事の話」→言及なし。4「休憩する」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Ted found an umbrella at his house. He called his friends Angela and Becky, but they had their umbrellas. Later, his cousin Linda came and said that it was hers.

questions.question: Whose umbrella was it?
questions.explanation: 「いとこのリンダが自分のだと言った」。
highlights: his cousin Linda came and said that it was hers
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「テッドの」→見つけただけ。2「アンジェラの」→自分のを持っている。3「リンダの」→正解。4「ベッキーの」→自分のを持っている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Attention, everyone. We will now begin the math test. After you finish, you can go outside to have lunch in the area next to the teachers' room. Be quiet near this classroom.

questions.question: Where is the woman talking?
questions.explanation: 「数学のテストを始めます」→教室で話している。
highlights: We will now begin the math test
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「レストラン」→テスト。2「学校」→正解。3「カフェテリア」→言及なし。4「動物園」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This morning, Rachel went to a post office to send a letter. She needed a stamp for the envelope, but she couldn't buy one because she forgot to take her wallet with her.

questions.question: What was Rachel's problem?
choices: She couldn't find a post office.
questions.explanation: 「財布を忘れて切手が買えなかった」。
highlights: she couldn't buy one because she forgot to take her wallet
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「財布を壊した」→忘れた。2「手紙をなくした」→送りに行った。3「郵便局が見つからない」→行った。4「切手が買えなかった」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went shopping last week to buy some new cups, but the store didn't have any nice ones. Yesterday, my friend gave me two new cups. They are beautiful.

questions.question: Where did the woman get new cups?
questions.explanation: 「昨日友達が新しいカップを2つくれた」。
highlights: my friend gave me two new cups
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ショッピングモール」→良いのがなかった。2「友達から」→正解。3「ネットで」→言及なし。4「アーティストから」→言及なし。
